message:
fix(fcp-graphql): resolve Rust 2024 reserved prefix error in schema test

The `$ref` and `$defs` strings in a raw string literal triggered
"prefix is unknown" errors under Rust 2024 edition. Replaced the
raw string with `serde_json::json!()` macro construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
